raw_text: I am extremely disappointed with the service and the lack of proper customer support. The Help & Support section does not even provide an option to type and explain my specific issue. I am repeatedly assigned delivery partners from a Muslim background, and I wanted to raise this concern and understand how delivery partners are assigned. However, there is no appropriate option available in the app to explain or discuss this concern with customer support. I request you to improve this
awesome app for instant deliveries. just one thing I would like to mention..after an order of atleast 200rs, they must not take extra packaging charges.

dark ux pattern of always having a notification badge in the app icon. to manipulate you into checking it repeatedly. I have stopped using this app. these tactics are not a sign of a respectable business.
It's nice, but just remember when you can't assign a delivery partner, don't ask us for cancellation fee, rest you guys are awesome 😎😎👍

Not good app to use As customer care is not properly working... Ie robbot is replying which is not satisfactory.. No phone line option available I am having bachat club memebership since 2 month.. But i am not reciving any winwin points on my last three purchase orders.. I had discussed this issue but still the problem persist.. In my last order I had bought walnut which were stinking and fungal was there... So i have discontinued the use of this app.. Beware...
Blinkit is a scam. You order something they deliver something else. And in replacement they again deliver wrong product. And no replacement and no refund again
Really it is the last minute app the delivery arrived less than within the given time. And I ordered first time and The blinkit small paper handbag with Tic tac toe, dot game was really cool 🔥👍🏻
Please verify all items on delivery ; they refuse to acknowledge any missing items and will not even respond and spam you with pre configured messages. V sad experience .
a must app for groceries and daily livestock. Prices are so affordable and they actually deliever In 10 minutes! I am highly satisfied by the response of the app 👒
very bad service, bcoz it's take time to much to delivered the order & application is showing arrived in 10-15 minutes.. but company take time more than 30 minutes...

I have placed an order for the Airwick automatic room refresher today@2.28p and found that the product was not working. I raised a complaint through chat with their representative, but the chat was closed without resolving my problem.

Blinkit makes my life a little more organized and sorted. It offers a vast variety of products at very competitive prices and provides quality at affordable pricing. I must say, join the program and feel the difference .. Keep shopping ✨

never order cosmetic from blink it I ordered serum which cost for 1,399 and when I received it it was not in packaging and very dirty I raised a return request and they deny to return . So, never ever order cosmetic from blinkit

The wrong product delivered then no replacement nor refund, also charging extra for delivery charge, surge charge extra amount collected when comparing to zepto is too good for resolving the solution within a min no extra charge for delivery nor surge charge.

I order something get something and after talking with customer care they told your app problem your network problem, They blame us only. Worst app, they never support, I advice please don't use this app, Worst app. worst Experience.
Only good if you want something in urgency, else I'd prefer to buy physically. You get what they throw at you like expiry /near expiry product.
Easy to use, very convenient, lots of good offers, and delivers quickly. My last minute app!

I had a great experience with Blink. The service was quick, smooth, and professional. The staff was polite and helpful, and everything was handled efficiently. I'm very satisfied with the overall experience and would definitely recommend Blink to others. Keep up the great work

blinkit is a very good and trustworthy app I definitely like it more than Swiggy as Swiggy Instamart sometimes doesn't give me the right order, while blinkit comes fast with the right order always, this is not a paid review hope this helps you. also pls deliver in bapatla as there are many senior citizens there and would really like ro use blinkit...

The app is very good . Have not faced any issue till now . I recommend u this app really. The thing is , I don't mind whether my products arrive in 30 mins or 10 but Blinkit always gets it before 10 - 12 mins . Really like the app !
